description: Represents a feed that receives media for inference processing

---

Required: Yes  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption

---

Required: Yes  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

CallbackMetadata.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 1024  
Pattern: ^[\w \-\.',@:;]*$  
Update requires: No interruption

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String

Update requires: No interruption

---

Required: No  
Type: String

---

Required: No

---

Required: No  
Type: String

---

Required: No

---

Required: No
